name: Split Pea Soup (Vegan)
recipeIngredient: 1/4 cup Green onions with tops, diced
10 ounces Frozen peas (rinsed under hot water)
recipeInstructions:
1. In a large 5-6 quart pot, bring water to a boil. Add split peas, celery, onion, thyme, and bay leaves. Reduce heat and simmer covered for about 20 minutes or until the split peas are slightly softened.
2. Add carrots, garlic, basil, and oregano. Bring to a second boil, then continue simmering covered until the split peas are very tender and have dissolved into the broth.
3. Stir in potatoes and simmer until they are tender but still firm.
4. Reduce heat to lowest setting. Stir in green onions, salt, tamari soy sauce, and cayenne pepper to taste. Add peas if desired.
5. Heat gently, stirring occasionally, until the peas are tender.
